regional_cost_note: Builders in Dunedin typically charge $75–$110/hr. New build costs range $2,600–$3,800/m². Dunedin’s character homes require skilled craftspeople familiar with older construction methods.

businesses.name: Callum Flaws Construction
businesses.known_for: Specialising in character home renovations and high-performance new builds across Dunedin.

businesses.name: Gray Contracting
businesses.known_for: Residential building specialist covering decks, fences, new builds, kitchen renovations, re-cladding, and retaining walls.

businesses.name: H J N Builders
businesses.known_for: Licensed Building Practitioner offering residential building, kitchens & bathrooms, roofing, and handyman services with flexible after-hours availability.

businesses.name: Black Thistle Construction Limited
businesses.known_for: Licensed Building Practitioner with 38+ jobs completed, specialising in residential renovations, new builds, planning & consent, and insulation.

businesses.name: Dunedin City Contracting
businesses.known_for: Full-service construction firm handling all aspects of residential and commercial building including carpentry, plumbing, electrical, landscaping, and interior design.
